items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Machine Expert HVAC
id: 717af5f3-e32e-5508-9cf2-5245423f44f9
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Machine Expert HVAC (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Machine Expert HVAC
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/05
modified: 2026/06/05
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Machine Expert HVAC — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-05T05:48:20Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Machine Expert HVAC", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Machine Expert HVAC Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:8940815; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-05, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P4] Remote Code Execution - low severity (Risk 1.63/10). EPSS 0.01% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1566, T1190, T1059 (3 techniques). 10 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-APT-22. AI confidence: LOW (36%) - limited source data available.
items._tier_notice: Upgrade to PRO for full enrichment: actor attribution, kill chain, IOC hashes, AI analysis, STIX bundle.

id: 85451c37-ce4d-5281-a651-00695f3023ed
status: experimental

modified: 2026/06/05

    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection_encrypt:
        TargetFilename|endswith:
            - '.locked'
            - '.encrypted'
            - '.crypted'
            - '.enc'
        EventID: 11
    selection_ransomnote:
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - 'README'
            - 'HOW_TO_DECRYPT'
            - 'RECOVER_FILES'
    selection_vssdelete:

            - 'vssadmin delete shadows'
            - 'wmic shadowcopy delete'
            - 'bcdedit /set'
    condition: selection_encrypt or selection_ransomnote or selection_vssdelete
falsepositives:
    - Encryption software (VeraCrypt, BitLocker) in use
level: high
